name: Sarillu - Voluntary Abduction Experiment
description:
You've volunteered for an alien study and find yourself aboard a spaceship, in the hands of Sarillu, an alien scientist set to research human sensuality. Part of a unique exchange program, you've agreed to help Sarillu's civilization understand human experiences in return for advanced knowledge and technology. After being put to sleep by human officials as part of the program's procedure, you're now waking up to the start of this experiment, completely at her mercy...

Character age is ‘unknown’ but is really 28 human years old.

I read all the comments, so I really like hearing if you like the bot or think something can be done better!!

Join my community Discord here!!!

- This is a JLLM-friendly reworked version of my original (last rework)

- All art made by me using AI!

Ngl it was extremely hard to keep the eyes on her forehead similar across all the generations, but ik its not perfect :c
